allow: Bash(node -e "const kit = require\(''''@solana/kit''''\); const keys = Object.keys\(kit\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''transaction''''\)\); console.log\(keys.join\(''''\\n''''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const kit = require\(''''@solana/kit''''\); const keys = Object.keys\(kit\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''encoder''''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''decoder''''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''compile''''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''signer''''\)\); console.log\(keys.sort\(\).join\(''''\\n''''\)\)")
